The lighting is used to contrast the two classes. Option B talks about visual effects. While good visuals are part of filmmaking, the passage specifically points out the symbolic meaning behind the lighting choices, not just aesthetics. Option C mentions that social status was represented by light color in the past. The passage doesn't refer to historical practices, just the film's technique.
